comments: Love the focus on fair launch and community ownership. The veHolders deciding on emissions is such a powerful model!
This is exactly what DeFi needs - protocols that reward long-term holders rather than just hype chasers. Really excited to see how this plays out on MegaETH.
The flywheel effect with projects paying bribes for votes sounds brilliant. Gives real power to the community!
content:
Most people chase the latest memecoin hype. Real DeFi builders are stacking MARB positions before MarbMarket's fair launch on MegaETH.

A veDEX isn't just another DEX. It's a community-owned protocol where your MARB locks translate to voting power. Longer locks = more influence + more rewards.

The magic happens weekly when veHolders decide which LP pools get MARB emissions. Projects pay bribes for votes, creating a flywheel that rewards early lockers.

MegaETH needed a proper veDEX. MarbMarket delivers with no presale, no VCs—just pure, fair launch economics.

x.com/Marb_market

@RallyOnChain what ve(3,3) model are you most excited to see take hold?
